creator: srinivas@hybrid.com
text: We have a freeBSD 2.0 crashing in the interval of once a week at a customer site.  The last crash indicated that it happenned in our driver interrupt routines.  But the interesting thing is that on two occasions it happneed while the weekly cron job was running at the same time aand the last incident happenned when the atrun job was the current process.
